programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian navigates everyday life in New York with his eccentric group of friends, dealing with trivial yet absurd situations. Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life. Through ironic twists and self-centered decisions, their actions often lead to humorous and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Seinfield: Episode
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian navigates everyday life in New York with his eccentric group of friends, dealing with trivial yet absurd situations. Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life. Through ironic twists and self-centered decisions, their actions often lead to humorous and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Seinfield: Episode
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian navigates everyday life in New York with his eccentric group of friends, dealing with trivial yet absurd situations. Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life. Through ironic twists and self-centered decisions, their actions often lead to humorous and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: (PG) Elaine tries to convert a gay man to heterosexuality. George, who's now wearing his toupee, discovers that the woman Kramer has set him up with is bald.

programme.title: Seinfeld
